title: Runtime policy verification and observability
summary: Ensure expanded derived runtime policy is clearly visible in runtime artifacts (status.json and cycle summaries) via a dedicated derived_policy payload, and add focused tests proving policy fields are emitted/populated for constrained low-wallet, zombie pressure, normal/balanced, and entry-blocked states. No behavior redesign; observability-only additions.
why_safe: Adds observability fields only (status.json + cycle summary payload); does not change trade execution logic.
Makes policy operator-visible without altering T-013/T-014/T-015 safety behavior.
commit_message: Improve runtime policy observability and verification
notes_for_cursor: Scope limited to trader status/cycle payload + focused observability tests and workflow artifacts.
